Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Dec-05-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Matthew Perotti, via Zoom, for Shirley Gray, Petitioner.

The court acknowledges having reviewed counsel's declaration pending in the court's e-filing queue and advises that it is prepared to take the matter under submission accordingly. Counsel affirms his declaration mentioned by the court and offers no additional information.

The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
